facts: A generated projection omitted recurrence metadata.
The source learning record retained the recurrence key.
records.interpretation: Projection consumers need recurrence metadata to correlate repeated workflow friction.

routing.action: Update workflow learning guidance after release.

correction.intended_behavior: Projection records carry recurrence keys from correction-needed source learnings.
correction.observed_behavior: The fixture models a missing recurrence key regression.
correction.gap: Without recurrence metadata, Console cannot cluster repeated workflow learning signals.
